items.title: Iran says it struck ships in Strait of Hormuz after US launches new strikes
items.dek: US Central Command said its latest airstrikes were responding to "unwarranted and continued aggression" from Iran.
items.body: US Central Command said its latest airstrikes were responding to "unwarranted and continued aggression" from Iran.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Trump says he 'loves the inflation' as US prices rise at fastest rate in three years
items.dek: Consumers are increasingly feeling the strain of the US-Israel war in Iran.
items.body: Consumers are increasingly feeling the strain of the US-Israel war in Iran.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Watch: Historic US-Canada border library gets new Quebec-only entrance
items.dek: The Trump administration in 2025 paused the use of the famous Haskell Library's main entrance on the US side, which had been used by both countries for decades.
items.body: The Trump administration in 2025 paused the use of the famous Haskell Library's main entrance on the US side, which had been used by both countries for decades.
items.author: IriLine Desk
